input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixRmSmallIncreasedQOffers.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fixRmSmallIncreasedQOffers: This amendment fixes an issue where certain Offers, when almost completely consumed, have a much lower exchange rate than when they were first placed. This occurs when the remaining amounts of one or both assets are so small that they cannot be rounded to a similar ratio as when the Offer was placed. Without this amendment, an Offer in this state blocks Offers with better rates deeper in the order book and causes some payments and Offers to fail when they could have succeeded. With this amendment, payments and trades can remove these types of Offers the same way that transactions normally remove fully consumed or unfunded Offers.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixRmSmallIncreasedQOffers appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 1.7.2.
